name: dashboard-ui
description: React + TypeScript dashboard UI for the Codex control plane.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && rsync -az --delete dist/ codex-server:/root/codex/dev/dashboard-ui/dist/ && ssh codex-server 'rsync -a --delete /root/codex/dev/dashboard-ui/dist/ /root/codex/release/projects/dashboard-ui/tool/'
